banner.subtitle: Multiplatform application developer passionate about creating innovative and efficient technological solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a developer specialized in multiplatform application development, passionate about creating efficient and adaptable solutions that provide real value to users. I consider myself a curious and constantly learning person, always keeping up with the latest technological trends to stay updated and apply the best in each project.
about.p2: Besides programming, sports and discipline are an essential part of my life, qualities I bring into my daily work: consistency, organization, and commitment to achieving ambitious goals.
about.p3: I am motivated to be part of projects where I can contribute innovation, work in a team, and continue growing professionally, always aiming for technical excellence and continuous improvement.

tech.title: Technology Stack
tech.intro: Technologies and tools I work with across the full development lifecycle.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.intro: A collection of projects spanning e-commerce, clean energy, and enterprise software. Each one taught me something new about solving real-world problems with code.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.intro: If you have a project idea, a job opportunity, or just want to say hi, feel free to write to me. I am always open to new collaborations and challenges.

meta.title: Mikel Romero — Multiplatform Developer Portfolio
meta.description: Mikel Romero — Multiplatform application developer specializing in ERP, Java, JavaScript, and Velneo V37. Portfolio showcasing projects in e-commerce, clean energy, and enterprise software.
meta.ogDescription: Multiplatform application developer passionate about creating innovative and efficient technological solutions.
